title: Knysna Speaker gets the boot
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna Council Speaker Mncedisi Skosana has been removed as a councillor by Western Cape Local Government minister Anton Bredell, with immediate effect.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna Council Speaker Mncedisi Skosana has been removed as a councillor by Western Cape Local Government minister Anton Bredell, with immediate effect."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Bredell’s ruling was made in a letter on Friday 23 May to Skosana highlighting the “seriousness” of the infringement."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Skosana has also been ordered to repay 20% of all allowances he received as a councillor and Speaker.","html":"Skosana has also been ordered to repay 20% of all allowances he received as a councillor and Speaker."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Bredell’s action follows recommendations contained in a Committee Investigation into the Conduct of Councillors concluded in September last year, following a Western Cape High Court decision that found political appointments in Knysna to be illegal.","html":"Bredell’s action follows recommendations contained in a Committee Investigation into the Conduct of Councillors concluded in September last year, following a Western Cape High Court decision that found political appointments in Knysna to be illegal."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The investigation recommended that Skosana, former mayor Aubrey Tsengwa, both ANC, and deputy mayor Alberto Marbi, of the PBI, all members of the ruling coalition, be removed from office.","html":"The investigation recommended that Skosana, former mayor Aubrey Tsengwa, both ANC, and deputy mayor Alberto Marbi, of the PBI, all members of the ruling coalition, be removed from office."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Bredell first requested the three to make representations to him on the recommendations, before taking action."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Tsengwa and Marbi both resigned as councillors to avoid Bredell’s sanctions.","html":"Tsengwa and Marbi both resigned as councillors to avoid Bredell’s sanctions."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
